stemHtml: On an RNP 1 route B235 Y, the letter Y means all turns must be within RNP tolerance of a tangential arc with a radius of…

options.a: 22.5 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and above FL200.
options.b: 25 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and above FL200.
options.c: 22.5 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and above FL190.
options.d: 15 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and below FL190.
